sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97734" key="sugkata/furtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκατά-φυρτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φύρω</etym>) <sense id="n97734.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kneaded in together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:3:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
